name: calendar-watch-listener
description: Calendar_Watch_Listener — scheduling sub-phase B Task B2. Receives Google Calendar push notifications, validates X-Goog-Channel-Token via SHA-256 hash compare, dispatches to picasso-calendar-watch-events-staging.fifo per scheduling/docs/listener_dispatch_interface.md (B0 spec).

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
